questions.text: Soroban contracts are compiled to which format for execution?
Which statement best describes Soroban contract storage?
options: State is stored explicitly in the Stellar ledger when the contract writes it
State is stored in the user’s browser localStorage
State is stored on Horizon servers only

questions.text: In Soroban, what is `Env` primarily used for?
options: Accessing storage, auth, and ledger context
